gates.message: purpose-contract/v2 is the admitted intent source for workspec/v4
admission producer and accepting authority differ
admission decision matches the current artifact digest
handover producer and accepting authority differ
handover decision matches the current artifact digest
handover references the current PurposeContract digest
current_spec.uri must resolve inside the work directory
current_spec.digest must bind the exact snapshot bytes
current_spec.snapshot_id must match the referenced snapshot
current spec snapshot requirement IDs must be unique
delta sources must exist once, added IDs must be new, and rename/modify IDs must be coherent
WorkSpec requirements must equal the deterministic snapshot plus delta result
